S.FORM: aicu ti Uong'e Yatauyungana (ciniukukan: Śźĺťõć¬∑ťõÖťĀĒÁÉŹÁĆ∂Ść°ťā£ katua ťęėšłÄÁĒü; cou a kai: Uong'e Yatauyungana; rinipunan: ÁüĘŚ§öšłÄŚ§ę,ÁüĘŚ§öšłÄÁĒü), nalemadaw kemasi imaza i kagi alisan a lalauya a qinaljan, se cou zuku timadju. kasicuayan timadju mavan a kinsac, sinsi, aza caucau nasemansenay katua guciu imaza i Śź≥ť≥≥ a qinaljan (tucu a alisan a qinaljan), avan sika pungadan aravac timadju namasan ta san palailaingan a sinupuan a caucau nasecou zuku, palailaingan a sidjiyan a caucau, palailaingan a vinarungan, seman ta ung-gaku a caucau, venecivecik. nakisamuljamulja timadju a seman ta undu patjara ljaicu a sengsengan itua kilalaing ta sikuakudan kimadju nasekacalisian tazua, kinemenemen uta aza ŚéüšĹŹśįĎŤá™ś≤ĽŚćÄ nua aya aicu a vinarungan nimadju. saka kipaula aravac ka ÁôĹŤČ≤śĀźśÄĖ a djiday. qau tucu izua a madrusa a kisansemenay ti ťęėśÖßŚźõ katua ťęėŤēĺťõÖ mavan a vuvu a vavayan nimadju. kipalikuzan sunatj == rivurivuan a 228 ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti uuŇč Ē…ô jataujuŇčana ( ¶iniukukan: ********* katua ***; ¶uu a kai: uuŇč Ē…ô jataujuŇčana; rinipunan: ****,****), na…≠…ômadaw k…ômasi imaza i kagi a…≠isan a …≠a…≠auja a qina éan, s…ô ¶uu zuku tima…Ču. kasi ¶uajan tima…Ču mavan a kinsa ¶, sinsi, aza ¶au ¶au nas…ômans…ônaj katua gu ¶iu imaza i ** a qina éan (tu ¶u a a…≠isan a qina éan), avan sika puŇčadan arava ¶ tima…Ču namasan ta san pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a sinupuan a ¶au ¶au nas…ô ¶uu zuku, pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a si…Čijan a ¶au ¶au, pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a vinaruŇčan, s…ôman ta uŇč-gaku a ¶au ¶au, v…ôn…ô ¶iv…ô ¶ik. nakisamu éamu éa tima…Ču a s…ôman ta undu pa ¶ara éai ¶u a s…ôŇčs…ôŇčan itua ki…≠a…≠aiŇč ta sikuakudan kima…Ču nas…ôka ¶a…≠isian tazua, kin…ôm…ôn…ôm…ôn uta aza ****** nua aja ai ¶u a vinaruŇčan nima…Ču. saka kipau…≠a arava ¶ ka **** a …Čidaj. qau tu ¶u izua a ma…Ėusa a kisans…ôm…ônaj ti *** katua *** mavan a vuvu a vavajan nima…Ču. kipa…≠ikuzan suna ¶ == rivurivuan a *** ==
S.FORM: aicu ti Uong'e Yatauyungana (ciniukukan: Śźĺťõć¬∑ťõÖťĀĒÁÉŹÁĆ∂Ść°ťā£ katua ťęėšłÄÁĒü; cou a kai: Uong'e Yatauyungana; rinipunan: ÁüĘŚ§öšłÄŚ§ę,ÁüĘŚ§öšłÄÁĒü), nalemadaw kemasi imaza i kagi alisan a lalauya a qinaljan, se cou zuku timadju. kasicuayan timadju mavan a kinsac, sinsi, aza caucau nasemansenay katua guciu imaza i Śź≥ť≥≥ a qinaljan (tucu a alisan a qinaljan), avan sika pungadan aravac timadju namasan ta san palailaingan a sinupuan a caucau nasecou zuku, palailaingan a sidjiyan a caucau, palailaingan a vinarungan, seman ta ung-gaku a caucau, venecivecik. nakisamuljamulja timadju a seman ta undu patjara ljaicu a sengsengan itua kilalaing ta sikuakudan kimadju nasekacalisian tazua, kinemenemen uta aza ŚéüšĹŹśįĎŤá™ś≤ĽŚćÄ nua aya aicu a vinarungan nimadju. saka kipaula aravac ka ÁôĹŤČ≤śĀźśÄĖ a djiday. qau tucu izua a madrusa a kisansemenay ti ťęėśÖßŚźõ katua ťęėŤēĺťõÖ mavan a vuvu a vavayan nimadju. kipalikuzan sunatj == rivurivuan a 228 ==
S.PHON: ai ¶u ti uuŇč Ē…ô jataujuŇčana ( ¶iniukukan: ********* katua ***; ¶uu a kai: uuŇč Ē…ô jataujuŇčana; rinipunan: ****,****), na…≠…ômadaw k…ômasi imaza i kagi a…≠isan a …≠a…≠auja a qina éan, s…ô ¶uu zuku tima…Ču. kasi ¶uajan tima…Ču mavan a kinsa ¶, sinsi, aza ¶au ¶au nas…ômans…ônaj katua gu ¶iu imaza i ** a qina éan (tu ¶u a a…≠isan a qina éan), avan sika puŇčadan arava ¶ tima…Ču namasan ta san pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a sinupuan a ¶au ¶au nas…ô ¶uu zuku, pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a si…Čijan a ¶au ¶au, pa…≠ai…≠aiŇčan a vinaruŇčan, s…ôman ta uŇč-gaku a ¶au ¶au, v…ôn…ô ¶iv…ô ¶ik. nakisamu éamu éa tima…Ču a s…ôman ta undu pa ¶ara éai ¶u a s…ôŇčs…ôŇčan itua ki…≠a…≠aiŇč ta sikuakudan kima…Ču nas…ôka ¶a…≠isian tazua, kin…ôm…ôn…ôm…ôn uta aza ****** nua aja ai ¶u a vinaruŇčan nima…Ču. saka kipau…≠a arava ¶ ka **** a …Čidaj. qau tu ¶u izua a ma…Ėusa a kisans…ôm…ônaj ti *** katua *** mavan a vuvu a vavajan nima…Ču. kipa…≠ikuzan suna ¶ == rivurivuan a *** ==
